entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_INIT_POSE
entry.description: Keep the mechanism in the normal 20cm preparation pose. Maps to Climbing_Init_Pose_Start().

entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_PREPARE_40CM
entry.description: Raise to the 40cm preparation pose. Maps to Climbing_Prepare_40cm().

entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_EXECUTE_UP_20CM
entry.description: Execute 20cm climbing after the upper computer has moved the chassis to the edge. Maps to Climbing_Auto_Start_From_Touch_20cm().

entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_EXECUTE_UP_40CM
entry.description: Execute 40cm climbing after the upper computer has moved the chassis to the edge. Maps to Climbing_Auto_Start_From_Touch_40cm().

entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_EXECUTE_DOWN_20CM
entry.description: Execute 20cm descending after the upper computer has moved the chassis to the edge. Maps to Climbing_Descend_Auto_Start_20cm().

entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_WEAPON_HEAD_CLAMP_START
entry.description: Start weapon head clamping. Maps to Climbing_WeaponHeadClampStart().

entry.name: CLIMBING_CMD_WEAPON_ROD_DOCK_START
entry.description: Start weapon rod docking. Maps to Climbing_WeaponRodDockStart().

entry.name: CLAMPING_CMD_MOVE_TO_PARALLEL
entry.description: Move the mechanism to the parallel/clamp-ready angle (90 deg). Maps to ClampingController::MoveToClampAngle().

entry.name: CLAMPING_CMD_GRAB
entry.description: Close the claw to clamp the weapon head. Maps to ClampingController::OpenSolenoid().

entry.name: CLAMPING_CMD_MOVE_TO_RESET
entry.description: Reset the mechanism angle back to 0 deg. Maps to ClampingController::MoveToResetAngle().

entry.name: CLAMPING_CMD_RELEASE
entry.description: Release the claw. Maps to ClampingController::ReleaseSolenoid().

entry.name: CLAMPING_CMD_ADJUST
entry.description: Adjust the chassis position for clamping.

message.name: CHASSIS_VELOCITY_CMD
message.description: Chassis target velocity command (Vx, Vy, Vw)

message.name: CLIMBING_CMD
message.description: Climbing mechanism command from upper computer.

message.name: CLAMPING_CMD
message.description: Clamping mechanism command from upper computer.
